channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mamata Banerjee Criticises PM Modi Amid President Droupadi Murmu Discussions
item.description: The news revolves around the ongoing political disagreement involving West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee, Prime Minister Narendra Modi, and President Droupadi Murmu. Mamata Banerjee has public...

item.title: Kenya prepares for final KCSE exams under 8-4-4 as transition to CBE approaches
item.description: Kenyans have just two years left to sit the Kenya Certificate of Secondary Education (KCSE) under the old 8-4-4 system before the country fully adopts the Competency-Based Education (CBE) for senior s...

item.title: Philippine Air Force reorganizes reserve units to mirror regular force structure
item.description: The Philippine Air Force (PAF) has carried out a major restructuring of its reserve force as part of a broader initiative to implement the Total Defense Force development concept. The move aligns rese...

item.title: Global oil prices surge past $115 amid US-Israeli conflict with Iran and Strait of Hormuz closure, causing fuel shortages and unrest in South Asia
item.description: The article details the dramatic impact of escalating geopolitical tensions on global energy markets. Following the second week of the US-Israeli war with Iran, which has led to the effective closure ...

item.title: Historical Events of March 9: From Ancient China to Modern Film Awards
item.description: The article by Greg Hutson from the Daily News offers a sweeping journey through momentous historical events that occurred on March 9 across different centuries. It opens with thought-provoking quotes...

item.title: Journalist Lucia Osborne-Crowley recounts the fight to expose Ghislaine Maxwell and support Epstein survivors
item.description: Lucia Osborne-Crowley, an Australian-born journalist now based in London, has spent years investigating Ghislaine Maxwell and Jeffrey Epstein, focusing on the experiences of the survivors rather than ...

item.title: PMD cautions on worsening air quality in western Pakistan due to Iran conflict
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a warning that winds from Iran could carry pollutants into Pakistan, potentially worsening air quality in the western regions. This development ...

item.title: James Talarico Wins Texas Democratic Senate Primary, Faces Uncertain GOP Opponent in General Election
item.description: Texas state Rep. James Talarico secured the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate after defeating U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett in a competitive primary on March 3, 2026. The race was delayed slightly du...

item.title: Tanzania’s capital markets show steady growth amid global tensions
item.description: Dar es Salaam: Tanzania’s capital markets are showing solid growth even as the world faces rising geopolitical tensions, especially between the US and Iran. Domestic investors are increasingly confide...

item.title: IGP Disu Removes Akin Fakorede From Police Monitoring Unit Over Misconduct Allegations
item.description: Inspector General of Police (IGP) Olatunji Disu don remove Commissioner of Police Akin Fakorede from him post as head of IGP Monitoring Unit for Force Headquarters, Abuja. Fakorede, wey be former SARS...

item.title: Bill C-3 Allows Americans with Canadian Roots to Apply for Citizenship by Descent
item.description: With the enactment of Bill C-3 on December 15, 2025, Canada removed the first-generation limit on citizenship by descent, allowing people born abroad to Canadian parents to apply for citizenship regar...

item.title: Meet the Korean Actors Starring as Jisoo's Love Interests in 'Boyfriend on Demand'
item.description: Korean drama fans are excited as Netflix's 'Boyfriend on Demand' features popular actors playing the romantic interests of K-pop star Jisoo. The series casts Seo In Guk, Lee Soo Hyuk, Seo Kang Joon, K...

item.title: Facial reconstruction released to identify man found dead in wetsuit at Claerwen Reservoir
item.description: Detectives from Dyfed-Powys Police have released a digital facial reconstruction of an unidentified man whose highly decomposed body was discovered floating in Claerwen Reservoir, a remote location in...

item.title: Analysis of Competition Commission Remedies for Meta in South Africa
item.description: South Africa’s Competition Commission recently concluded its Media and Digital Platforms Market Inquiry (MDPMI), a significant step in regulating platform power in the Global South. While Google faced...

item.title: AI-Generated Fake Satellite Images Fuel Disinformation in US-Iran Conflict
item.description: As tensions escalate in the ongoing conflict involving the United States, Israel, and Iran, concerns are mounting over the rapid spread of disinformation amplified by artificial intelligence. An Irani...

item.title: Dangote Refinery and NNPCL Cause Petrol Prices to Spike in Abuja
item.description: NNPCL don increase petrol price again for Abuja, making am the second time inside less than 24 hours. As of Sunday, pump price don jump from ₦967 to ₦1,082 per litre after Dangote Refinery raise im ga...

item.title: Jaishankar Comments on Docking of Iranian Ships at Kochi Amid Iran-Israel Tensions
item.description: In the Indian Parliament, External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar addressed questions regarding the docking of Iranian ships, including the Iris Lavan, at Kochi. He clarified that the docking was in a...

item.title: Stephen Mayne reflects on Crikey’s journey and professionalisation in 2005
item.description: Crikey, the independent Australian news outlet, celebrates its 26th anniversary, marking two key milestones. The first is its official launch on 14 February 2000, during the dot-com boom. The second i...

item.title: Physiotherapist and paraplegic peer supporter deliver home-based wheelchair care and support in rural KZN
item.description: In the remote northern KwaZulu-Natal area near the Mozambique border, physiotherapist Maryke Bezuidenhout and paraplegic peer supporter Moses Mthembu form a dedicated outreach team from Manguzi Hospit...

item.title: PM Shehbaz rewards national hockey players for World Cup qualification
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Monday announced a reward of Rs1.5 million for each member of the national hockey team following their successful qualification for the FIH Hockey World Cup. This achi...
